repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lingam_direction_min_order_v1 concerns non-Gaussian cumulant direction recovery, not Gaussian-ANM score-Jacobian local geometry.

published_prior_art.cite: rolland2022score gives the population leaf functional and zhu2023sample a finite-sample SCORE guarantee; neither derives the mirror-path C_m(delta)-to-Chernoff expansion.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue entry gives a likelihood order-error exponent indexed by a SCORE diagonal-Jacobian gap.

published_prior_art.cite: chernoff1952measure supplies the simple-product testing exponent; the added content is its calibration by the explicit mirror ANM score-gap geometry.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue entry gives a local causal-order decision limit for a Gaussian-ANM mirror path.

published_prior_art.cite: Standard local-testing machinery yields an elbow once the new C_m(delta)-to-information expansion is established; h​​oyer2008nonlinear and peters2014anm provide only qualitative ANM asymmetry.

repo_prior_art.cite: No repository entry states this mirror-path reduction.

published_prior_art.cite: hoyer2008nonlinear identifies the linear-Gaussian reversible boundary.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue entry analyzes a centered-variance cross-fitted diagonal score-Jacobian contrast.

published_prior_art.cite: zhu2023sample analyzes finite-sample SCORE correctness, but not this template-specific centered-variance calculation or its r_n=o(sqrt(C_m)) condition.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue entry studies primitive tilted-loss control for this causal-order template.

published_prior_art.cite: koehler2023efficiency concerns score-matching efficiency for density parameters, not training-procedure conditions for causal-order tilted losses.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorems 1–3 / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The information frontier and moving-alternative elbow are only for the explicitly constructed two-node mirror Gaussian-ANM path, with no uniform claim over nonlinear ANMs.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: A pointwise local causal-order testing characterization under the stated mirror-path regularity conditions.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Proposition 2 / ass:jacobian-estimability
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Feasible score-contrast consistency assumes cross-fitted diagonal score-Jacobian estimability at the declared training-random L4 rate; it does not assert exponent attainment.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conditional on r_n=o(sqrt(C_m(delta_n))), the specified template is sign-consistent; exponent attainment requires additional primitive training conditions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add one explicit bounded smooth Hermite-centered mechanism and calculate or numerically certify positive c_1 and c_2, making the local geometry auditable on a concrete instance.
Specify a concrete score-Jacobian learner and formulate primitive exponential-stability conditions sufficient for the tilted-loss target.
Extend the pointwise mirror calculation to a normalized tangent class, or prove a sharp obstruction showing why no uniform C_m-only frontier can hold.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the accepted pointwise and conditional scopes fixed.
